responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Build and deploy enterprise time zone architecture, fix owner sign-in, align colors with IVX landing palette, QA/redesign Reels card, fix chat UX issues, redesign IVX registration/login experience, add required birthday + gender fields, run 30-root-cause Expo Go forensic repair, execute complete 20-section landing page QA, and complete final landing page closeout (CORS, CLS, accessibility, scroll restoration, owner recovery auth, 404, canonical redirect, bundle audit)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Birthday field REQUIRED (MM/DD/YYYY, age 18-120, stored as `dateOfBirth` ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
- Gender field REQUIRED — chip selector: Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- GitHub pushes require orphan branch technique to exclude `.rork/history/` files with secrets

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified, 8 cities + DST verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Landing page 20-section QA completed — fixes deployed and verified**:
  - All 8 routes 200, HTTPS enforced, rate limiting live (login 5 burst/0.5/s), property details API fixed (jv_deals first)
  - Signup E2E verified: real QA member created, email verification required
  - Validation: missing gender → 400, missing birthday → 400, invalid gender → 400, underage → 400, owner role → 400
  - SEO complete: title, OG, Twitter, canonical, sitemap, robots, 4 JSON-LD schemas
  - Analytics: Google Ads gtag, Meta Pixel, LinkedIn insight tag, UTM capture
- **Landing QA fixes DEPLOYED**: Commit `cb4b21c` (rate limiting + property details + CLS + CSP + reduced-motion), commit `b36c472` (role validation) — both verified live
- **Backend `b36c4721` deployed and verified**: Role validation fix confirmed live
- **Expo Go forensic investigation completed (Roots 1-30)**:
  - SDK 54.0.35, 242 routes, 3,972 modules, bundle 39.1MB dev / 30.9MB prod
  - Fake watchman binary at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` unblocks Metro cold builds in cloud sandbox
  - Metro running on port 8081, tunnel `exp://9gmyh1o-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` LIVE
  - Manifest 200, bundle 200 (verified server-side)
  - Metro config blocklist for 48 server-only packages added (no bundle size reduction — packages weren't in import graph)
  - Device testing NOT VERIFIED — requires owner's physical Android phone
- **Final closeout fixes IMPLEMENTED AND PUSHED**:
  - CORS: Replaced ALL `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` with origin allowlist across 35 backend files (hono.ts + 34 API files) — 0 wildcards remaining
  - Owner recovery auth: Added bearer token check to `handleOwnerRecoveryStatusRequest` — returns 401 without token
  - Landing CLS: Fixed video height in gallery slider (was `height: 200px`, changed to `height: 100%`)
  - Scroll restoration: Added `pagehide`/`pageshow` listeners with `sessionStorage` for back/forward navigation
  - Keyboard navigation: Focus trap for modals, Escape to close overlays, skip-to-content link
  - Accessibility: Nav `role="navigation"` + `aria-label`, hamburger `role="button"` + `aria-expanded` + `tabindex`, skip-to-content link
  - Committed as `3abaa17` via orphan branch `deploy-final-closeout` → GitHub main (force push)

### In Progress
- **Render deploy of `3abaa17` pending** — previous deploy `2cb2b795` was from broken first push (orphan branch created from stashed state, fixes not included). Second push `3abaa17` has actual fixes. Need to verify Render deploys `3abaa17` and CORS/owner-recovery fixes are live.
- **Final closeout verification** — need to confirm after `3abaa17` deploys:
  - CORS: `access-control-allow-origin` should NOT be `*` on any endpoint
  - Owner recovery: `/api/ivx/owner-recovery/status` without auth should return 401
  - Landing HTML: scroll restoration, keyboard nav, accessibility improvements

### Blocked
- **CORS fix not yet live** — deployed commit `2cb2b795` was from broken push (stashed edits). Commit `3abaa17` with actual fixes pushed but not yet deployed by Render.
- **Owner recovery auth not yet live** — same issue as CORS (waiting for `3abaa17` deploy)
- **www.ivxholding.com does not 301 redirect to ivxholding.com** — requires Cloudflare DNS/page rule change
- **404 returns 200 on ivxholding.com** — S3 SPA fallback serves index.html for all paths; requires CloudFront Lambda edge function
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3** — AWS credentials not available in cloud sandbox (`AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` not set); deploy script `expo/scripts/deploy-landing-index-only.mjs` requires AWS creds
- **Device QA (Android, iPhone, desktop) NOT VERIFIED** — requires physical devices; cloud sandbox cannot run browser-based screenshot tools
- **Media QA (play/pause/mute/swipe/like/comment) NOT VERIFIED** — requires real device
- **Bundle size 39.1MB not reducible** — Expo Go uses dev mode; 242 routes + SDK 54 core = ~39MB minimum. Under 15MB target not technically possible in Expo Go dev mode.
- **CSP HTTP header not applied on S3** — S3 serves static HTML without security headers; CSP meta tag in HTML but HTTP-level headers need CloudFront/Cloudflare

## Key Decisions
- CORS allowlist: `IVX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` array in `hono.ts` with `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, `http://localhost:8081/3000/5173`, `http://127.0.0.1:8081/3000` — Hono `cors()` origin function returns `null` for non-allowlisted origins
- All 32 backend API files had `'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'` replaced with `'https://ivxholding.com'` via `sed` batch fix
- Owner recovery auth: checks `readBearerToken(request)` against `process.env.IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` — returns 401 if missing/mismatched
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`) returns synthetic JSON for `get-sockname`, `watch-project`, `version` commands — unblocks Metro cold builds in cloud sandbox with `nice_value=19`
- Metro config blocklist: `SERVER_ONLY_PACKAGES` array of 48 packages blocked via `config.resolver.resolveRequest` — had no effect because packages (pdf-lib, @aws-sdk, eas-cli, ai, unpdf, pg, zustand) were never imported in app source, only in deploy scripts
- Orphan branch push technique: `git checkout --orphan` → `git add` specific files → `git commit` → `git push github HEAD:main --force` — avoids `.rork/history/` files with secrets
- First closeout push (`2cb2b79`) failed because `git stash` was run before orphan branch creation — fixes were in stash, not in working tree. Second push (`3abaa17`) applied stash first (`git stash pop`) then created orphan branch with fixes in working tree.
- Production bundle (`dev=false`) is 30.9MB vs dev bundle 39.1MB — Expo Go uses dev mode
- Video gallery CLS fix: `.live-deal-gallery-slider video` height changed from `200px` to `100%` to match container `aspect-ratio: 16/10`

## Next Steps
- Wait for Render to deploy `3abaa17` and verify: CORS no longer `*`, owner recovery returns 401 without auth
- Redeploy landing HTML to S3 (requires AWS credentials) with scroll restoration, keyboard nav, accessibility fixes
- Verify `www.ivxholding.com` 301 redirect (requires Cloudflare DNS change)
- Implement branded 404 page (requires CloudFront Lambda or S3 error document)
- Owner opens `exp://9gmyh1o-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` in Expo Go on Android phone for device acceptance
- Run final closeout verification: Android QA, iPhone QA, desktop QA, media QA, member QA, public bundle audit
- Verify GitHub SHA = frontend SHA = backend SHA after all deploys complete

## Critical Context
- Backend deployed as `2cb2b795` (boot `2026-07-13T01:04:27.967Z`) — this is the BROKEN first push without fixes
- Commit `3abaa17` pushed to GitHub main with actual CORS/owner-recovery/landing fixes — Render auto-deploy pending
- Metro is running on port 8081 with tunnel `exp://9gmyh1o-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` — tunnel is LIVE
- `expo/.expo/settings.json` has `{"urlRandomness":"9GMyH1o"}` — tunnel URL derived from this
- AWS credentials not available in cloud sandbox — cannot deploy landing HTML to S3
- `chat.ivxholding.com` is separate Render static site (`srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`)
- Expo SDK 54 requires Expo Go 2.33.x+ on Android
- Bundle: 39,100,438 bytes dev (3,972 modules, 25s build time), 30,887,818 bytes prod

## Relevant Files
- `backend/hono.ts`: Main backend entry — CORS allowlist (`IVX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS`), rate limiting, all route registrations, health endpoint
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-recovery-sms.ts`: Owner recovery — now requires bearer token for status endpoint
- `backend/api/*.ts`: 34 API files — all CORS wildcards replaced with `'https://ivxholding.com'`
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html`: 8,978 lines — landing page with scroll restoration, keyboard nav, accessibility, CLS fixes
- `expo/metro.config.js`: Metro config with Watchman fallback (`useWatchman: false`) and server-only package blocklist
- `expo/scripts/deploy-landing-index-only.mjs`: S3 + CloudFront deploy script (requires AWS credentials)
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: Root layout — 5 startup providers (I18n, Auth, Analytics, IPX, Email)
- `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: Tab layout — 7 tabs (Home, Invest, Market, Portfolio, Chat, Profile)
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Auth context — 3 auto-login guard paths blocked
- `expo/components/IVXAuthCard.tsx`: Registration/login UI — ~1900 lines, glass card design
- `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`: Fake watchman binary — unblocks Metro in cloud sandbox (not committed)
